job_to_be_done: Translate a short text string into a target language using the MyMemory translation API so the agent can rewrite user-provided content across languages.
summary_for_model: Use this tool when the user explicitly asks to translate a phrase, sentence, or short paragraph between two specific natural languages.
trigger_conditions: The user requests a translation between two specific named languages.
The user pastes a foreign-language phrase and asks what it means.
The user wants to localize a short piece of UI copy or a message they will send.
do_not_use_when: The user wants to translate an entire document or large file (over a few sentences).
The user asks for nuanced creative translation requiring cultural context.

text.description: Source text to translate. Up to 500 characters.

target_lang.description: BCP-47 language code of the target language (e.g. 'ja', 'fr').

source_lang.description: BCP-47 language code of the source language. Defaults to 'en' if omitted.

usage_hints: what does this say in english
result_hints: detected_source_lang reports what we identified the input as
error_hints: If the source language cannot be detected, the call returns an error.
Texts longer than 500 chars are rejected — split into chunks first.
